text: In this space, my thoughts are awakened. The glow of the installation beyond the glass suggests new ideas and possibilities. It feels modern and slightly futuristic, designed for inquiry and curiosity. The words on the exhibit wall echo my own philosophical mindset—they invite me to ponder how humans connect with intelligent machines. I feel a kinship here, a sense of belonging to a community that values questioning, research, and wonder. It is inspiring, and I am quietly energized by the atmosphere.
